title: Repair PR110 rust embedded-assets CI regression from malformed Beads issue store
description: PR #110 CI run 23508740344 failed rust cucumber embedded-assets scenarios because /api/config returned 500 (JSON parse EOF) due malformed .beads/issues.jsonl introduced in commit d00a3f3. Restore issue store from previous good revision and verify embedded-assets scenarios pass.
creator: derek.norrbom

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Reproduced CI failure locally: cargo test --locked --test cucumber -- --name 'Embedded console assets|Zero-config console execution|Filesystem override takes precedence|Development build uses filesystem only' -vv failed 3/3 scenarios at 'When I start the console server' with 'Console server failed to become ready'. Root cause confirmed: /api/config returned HTTP 500 with JSON parse error 'EOF while parsing a string at line 1 column 479' due malformed .beads/issues.jsonl in commit d00a3f3.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Found and fixed Beads issue-store corruption: removed malformed truncated line in .beads/issues.jsonl and removed duplicate stale tskl-rbi.3 record. Validation: jq parses full JSONL; kbs list works again for open/in_progress.
